problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to microcracks, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.
